content.fact_text: Implementation of a CircuitBreakerFactory for standardized, production-ready infrastructure fault tolerance using Opossum and Zod.

provenance_data.behaviour: Creates and instruments Opossum circuit breakers for infrastructure operations with integrated structured logging, Zod validation, and configurable fallbacks.
interfaces: create<T, A extends any[]>(name: string, action: (...args: A) => Promise<T>, fallback: (err: Error, ...args: A) => Promise<T>, config?: Partial<CircuitBreakerConfig>): CircuitBreaker
provenance_data.utility: Provides a central mechanism for ensuring all infrastructure dependencies are wrapped in fault-tolerant logic to prevent cascading failures.
